spec.goal: Teach review-repair how to resolve GitHub review threads concretely by documenting the default `gh api graphql` flow for fetching thread IDs and calling `resolveReviewThread`, with an explicit reopen path via `unresolveReviewThread`.
success_criteria: review-repair/SKILL.md contains concrete `gh api graphql` guidance for fetching review thread IDs and resolving threads with `resolveReviewThread`
review-repair/SKILL.md documents the reopen path with `unresolveReviewThread`
dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py guards the presence of the explicit CLI/API guidance
the installed runtime review-repair skill matches the updated source skill after sync
focused verification passes after the update
constraints: Keep the change scoped to review-repair and its smoke
Do not restructure the broader review lifecycle or rename skills
Prefer stable guidance sentences and compact command examples over a brittle wall of shell
Use the already-active review lifecycle lane instead of creating a new workspace

tasks.title: Add explicit resolve CLI guidance to review-repair
tasks.objective: Update review-repair so verified-fix threads are resolved through a documented `gh api graphql` command path, including thread ID lookup and reopen guidance.
outputs: Updated review-repair commands and hard-gate wording

tasks.title: Harden smoke coverage for the resolve commands
tasks.objective: Update dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py so regressions in the explicit resolve CLI/API guidance fail the local smoke.
outputs: Smoke assertions for gh api graphql, resolveReviewThread, and unresolveReviewThread

tasks.title: Sync runtime skill and verify
tasks.objective: Hot-sync the installed review-repair skill copy and rerun the focused verification set.

triggers: The explicit resolve flow requires introducing a shared helper script instead of documenting commands in the skill
A repo-specific GitHub thread resolution entrypoint conflicts with the default gh api graphql path
The runtime sync path requires broader installer changes beyond the touched skill

evidence: 2026-03-19: Local probe confirmed that review-repair already requires resolving completed threads but does not yet document a concrete GitHub CLI/API path for doing so.

2026-03-19: Updated review-repair/SKILL.md with explicit gh api graphql guidance for listing review thread IDs, resolving completed threads through resolveReviewThread, and reopening via unresolveReviewThread.

2026-03-19: Hardened dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py to assert the new gh api graphql, reviewThreads(first: 100), resolveReviewThread, and unresolveReviewThread guidance; verified with python3 dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py and git diff --check.
2026-03-19: Hot-synced /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/review-repair/SKILL.md from source and verified the installed skill now contains the explicit GitHub thread command guidance.

local_checkpoint.current_theory: Agents are skipping thread resolution because the contract says when to resolve but not how to perform the resolve action through GitHub.
local_checkpoint.contradictory_evidence: If the runtime already had a separate repo-approved thread-resolution helper, documenting gh api graphql here could be redundant or conflicting.
local_checkpoint.missing_evidence: Need to add and verify a compact default gh api graphql path for query, resolve, and reopen inside review-repair.
local_checkpoint.next_action: Patch review-repair and its smoke, then hot-sync the installed skill copy.
